Package index

Package overview

IQCC IQCC-package
IQCC: Improved Quality Control Charts

Univariate location and dispersion

Shewhart charts and distribution-aware limits for continuous measurements.

cchart.Xbar()
X-bar Control Chart for phase I and II.
cchart.Xbar1()
X-bar Shewhart Control Chart for phase I.
cchart.Xbar2()
X-bar Shewhart Control Chart for phase II.
cchart.Xbar_R()
X-bar and R control charts
cchart.R()
Range Control Chart
cchart.S()
Standard-Deviation Control Chart
alpha.risk()
False-Alarm Probability for the Three-Sigma R Chart
c4()
C4 Constant.
d2()
D2 Constant.
d3()
D3 Constant.

Attribute control charts

Limits and false-alarm calculations for binomial and Poisson monitoring.

pchart_limits()
Probability Limits for p Charts
pchart_alpha_risk()
Exact False-Alarm Risk for p-Chart Limits
cchart.p()
p-chart
uchart_limits()
Probability Limits for u Charts
uchart_alpha_risk()
Exact False-Alarm Risk for u-Chart Limits
cchart.u()
u-chart

Double-sampling np charts

Exact-binomial design, performance evaluation, and operational monitoring.

dsnp_prob_accept()
Double-Sampling np Chart: Acceptance Probability
dsnp_arl()
Double-Sampling np Chart: Average Run Length
dsnp_ass()
Double-Sampling np Chart: Average Sample Size
dsnp_limits()
Double-Sampling np Chart: Limit Search
dsnp_design() print(<dsnp_design>)
Double-Sampling np Chart: Complete Design Search
cchart.DSnp()
Double-Sampling np Control Chart
print(<cchart.DSnp>) summary(<cchart.DSnp>) print(<summary.cchart.DSnp>)
Print and Summarize a Double-Sampling np Control Chart
plot(<cchart.DSnp>)
Plot a DS-np Control Chart

Multivariate monitoring

Hotelling T-squared and generalized variance charts.

T2.1()
Hotelling T2 Statistic for Phase I.
T2.2()
Hotelling T2 Statistic for Phase II.
cchart.T2.1()
Phase I Hotelling Control Chart.
cchart.T2.2()
Phase II Hotelling Control Chart.
gv_stat()
Generalized Variance by Subgroup
gv_limits()
Generalized Variance Control Limits
gv_alpha_risk()
False-Alarm Risk for Generalized Variance Charts
cchart.GV() plot(<cchart.GV>)
Generalized Variance Control Chart
print(<cchart.GV>) summary(<cchart.GV>) print(<summary.cchart.GV>)
Print and Summarize a Generalized Variance Control Chart

Data preparation and utilities

data.1()
Hotelling Control Chart Phase I simulated data.
data.2()
Hotelling Control Chart Phase II simulated data.
add.data()
Updates the Hotelling Control Chart.
remove.data()
Remove an undesirable observation.
stats()
Auxiliary statistics for the multivariate control chart.
table.const()
Table of values for the constants d2, d3 and c4.
table.qtukey()
Tukey Quantile Table

Example datasets

binomdata
Binomial Data.
moonroof
Moonroof
pistonrings
Piston Rings Data Set.
softdrink
Soft Drink Data Set.
